TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sengan i Yilan a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Sengan. u kasalumaluma' nu Sengan sa, Itiniay i Datong Cen no Yilan ko Sengan a niyaro', 30 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 93 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 91% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 85 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 9% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 8 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal86%, Amis1%, roma4%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: səŋan i jiɾan a ko~u~uwan no~u~u kaɾinko~u~u ko~u~u nija*o~u~uʡ no~u~u səŋan. o~u~u kasaɾo~u~umaɾo~u~umaʡ no~u~u səŋan sa, itiniaj i ɬ~ɮato~uŋ ʦən no~u jiɾan ko~u səŋan a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Sengan i Yilan a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Sengan. u kasalumaluma' nu Sengan sa, Itiniay i Datong Cen no Yilan ko Sengan a niyaro', 30 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 93 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 91% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 85 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 9% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 8 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal86%, Amis1%, roma4%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: səŋan i jiɾan a ko~u~uwan no~u~u kaɾinko~u~u ko~u~u nija*o~u~uʡ no~u~u səŋan. o~u~u kasaɾo~u~umaɾo~u~umaʡ no~u~u səŋan sa, itiniaj i ɬ~ɮato~uŋ ʦən no~u jiɾan ko~u səŋan a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
